data.title: CORRECTION: Motorsport Games Enters into Share Repurchase Agreement, Reinforcing Confidence in Company’s Growth Trajectory
data.description: Italian fashion brand MSGM recently bought back a significant number of shares from Driven Lifestyle. As part of the transaction, MSGM also decided to eliminate Class B voting rights associated with the repurchased shares. Additionally, the company announced an expansion of its employee equity plan to include more staff members in the ownership structure. This move demonstrates MSGM's commitment to enhancing employee engagement and aligning interests between employees and the company's performance.

data.title: Dreame NEXT North America Launch: Three Innovations Set to Shape the Future of the Smart Yard
data.description: On April 27-30, 2026, Dreame Technology is set to host its Silicon Valley launch event at the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco, USA. The event will introduce the new Dreame Roboticmower's innovative product, the All-in Center.

data.title: Keys Inc. to Present AI-Powered Locksmith ERP Platform at Startup Grind Global Conference, Addressing U.S. Licensing Gaps and Industry Fragmentation
data.description: Loay Jamal Alyousfi, the Founder and CEO, is scheduled to present at the VC Stage. The company, Keys Inc., based in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., announced on April 27, 2026, that they are positioned as an emerging trusted access layer for locksmith services. Keys Inc. is a technology firm focusing on developing AI-powered infrastructure for the locksmith sector.

data.title: Admiral Markets AS announces changes in the volume of its outstanding bond issue
data.description: Admiral Markets AS has recently revealed a modification in the size of its current bond offering, specifically the EUR 8.00 ADMIRAL MARKETS subordinated bond 17–2027 (ISIN: EE3300111251).

data.title: Solidion Technology Plans to File Section 337 Tariff Act Complaint Against Global Foreign Battery Manufacturers
data.description: A technology company, Solidion Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: STI), focused on advanced battery solutions, is ramping up efforts to monetize its patents. The Company plans to lodge a complaint with the U.S. authorities to accelerate this process. This move signifies Solidion's commitment to leveraging its intellectual property for growth and potentially increasing revenue streams. The action signals a strategic shift in the firm's approach to capitalize on its innovations in battery technology.

data.title: Rox Capital Partners Announces Sale of Water Infrastructure Platform Scruggs to The Sterling Group
data.description: A private equity firm named Rox Capital Partners (Rox) based in Texas recently disclosed the completion of the sale of The Platform. This entity was established through the merger of Scruggs and Neil Technical Services (NTS). Despite the change in ownership, the existing management team will carry on. The news was officially shared on April 27, 2026, and marks a significant transaction in the industry. The financial details regarding the sale were not divulged in the public statement.

data.title: FERRARI N.V.: PERIODIC REPORT ON THE BUYBACK PROGRAM
data.description: Italian luxury car manufacturer Ferrari N.V. has disclosed the purchase of common shares under its Euro 250 million share buyback program, which is part of a larger multi-year initiative totaling around Euro 3.5 billion set to be completed by 2030. This recent transaction, referred to as the "Second Tranche," involved the acquisition of additional common shares that are being regularly reported on Euronext Milan (EXM) as per regulatory requirements. The company has been following through on its commitment outlined during the 2025 Capital Markets Day to repurchase its own shares as part of its long-term financial strategy.

data.title: Procter & Gamble Analysts Raise Their Forecasts Following Strong Q3 Earnings
data.description: Procter & Gamble Co (NYSE: PG) announced their third-quarter financial results which exceeded expectations. The company reported quarterly earnings of $1.59 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.56 per share. Additionally, their quarterly sales totaled $21.235 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $20.516 billion. CEO Shailesh Jejurikar noted, "We saw significant growth in revenue in our fiscal third quarter, with strong performance across various product categories and regions." Procter & Gamble reaffirmed their 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to be between $6.83 and $7.09, as opposed to the $6.95 estimated by analysts. They also reiterated their 2026 sales outlook of $85.127 billion. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EEZ by Ethereum could bring other blockchains together, aiming for broader interoperability, says Ernst.
data.description: Ernst stated that the Ethereum Economic Zone's primary objective is to consolidate various rollups, with the ambition to enhance interoperability across multiple blockchains.

data.title: New report suggests MiCA has improved safety of euro stablecoins, but made them less competitive. Calls for reforms on reserves and remuneration.
data.description: According to a recently released report by Blockchain for Europe, the Market in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) has been credited with enhancing the security of euro stablecoins. However, the report also highlights that these stablecoins have become less competitive due to the regulations imposed by MiCA. The report suggests that specific reforms are needed, particularly in the areas of reserves and remuneration, to address the challenges faced by euro stablecoins. The report underscores the importance of balancing safety with competitiveness in the stablecoin market.

data.title: Three Experienced Attorneys from Hamilton Wingo Named Among Best Lawyers in Dallas
data.description: In Dallas, on April 27, 2026, three skilled lawyers from the plaintiffs law firm Hamilton Wingo have been recognized as some of the top attorneys in Dallas according to the 2026 D Magazine rankings. Chris Hamilton, Paul Wingo, and Brad Jackson, who are partners at the firm, were included in the prestigious list.
